title: rubus tereticaulis subsp. roridissimus
intro: Rubus tereticaulis subsp. roridissimus, also known as the thorny bramble, is a subspecies of the Rubus tereticaulis plant, a type of bramble native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus tereticaulis subsp. roridissimus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and stems can also be used in salves and ointments to promote skin health.
